name: Nowledge Mem
description: Cross-tool knowledge graph memory for OpenClaw with Working Memory, graph search, and session distillation.

sessionContext.label: Session context injection
sessionContext.help: Inject Working Memory and relevant memories at prompt time. Off by default; the agent can call memory_search on demand instead.

sessionDigest.label: Session digest at end
sessionDigest.help: Capture conversation threads and distill key memories via LLM at session end. On by default. Negligible cost, one triage call per session.

digestMinInterval.label: Minimum digest interval (seconds)
digestMinInterval.help: Minimum seconds between session digests for the same thread. Prevents heartbeat-driven burst captures. Set to 0 for no limit.

maxContextResults.label: Max context results
maxContextResults.help: How many memories to inject for each context cycle (1-20)

recallMinScore.label: Min recall score (%)
recallMinScore.help: Only inject memories with relevance score above this threshold (0-100). Set to 0 to include all results.

maxThreadMessageChars.label: Max thread message chars
maxThreadMessageChars.help: Maximum characters preserved per captured OpenClaw thread message (200-20000). Higher values keep more of long messages in Nowledge thread history.

captureExclude.label: Exclude session patterns
captureExclude.help: Extra session key glob patterns to skip during auto-capture (* = one colon segment). OpenClaw cron / isolated automation sessions are always excluded using the host's own session classification—no patterns required. Use this list for subagents or other sessions you want to filter.

captureSkipMarker.label: Skip marker
captureSkipMarker.help: Text marker in messages that prevents capture for the session. Default: #nmem-skip. Note: if compaction drops the marked message, capture resumes — use captureExclude patterns for persistent filtering.

corpusSupplement.label: Register as corpus supplement
corpusSupplement.help: Make Nowledge Mem searchable through memory-core's recall pipeline and dreaming promotion. Enable when memory-core is your memory slot and you want cross-tool knowledge to participate in OpenClaw's native recall and dreaming. When enabled, the plugin's own search-based recall is skipped to avoid duplicates (Working Memory injection continues).

corpusMaxResults.label: Corpus supplement max results
corpusMaxResults.help: Maximum results returned per corpus supplement search call (1-20). Only used when corpusSupplement is enabled.

corpusMinScore.label: Corpus supplement min score (%)
corpusMinScore.help: Minimum relevance score (0-100%) for corpus supplement results. Set to 0 to include all. Only used when corpusSupplement is enabled.

apiUrl.label: Server URL (remote mode)
apiUrl.help: Leave empty for local mode (default: http://127.0.0.1:14242). Set to your remote server URL for cross-device or team access. See: https://docs.nowledge.co/docs/remote-access

apiKey.label: API key (remote mode)
apiKey.help: Required when connecting to a remote server. Never logged or passed as a CLI argument. Injected as NMEM_API_KEY env var only.

sessionContext.description: Inject Working Memory and recalled memories at prompt time. Off by default; the agent queries memory on demand via tools.

sessionDigest.description: Capture conversation threads and distill key memories via LLM at session end. On by default.

digestMinInterval.description: Minimum seconds between session digests for the same thread (0 = no limit). Prevents heartbeat-driven burst captures.

maxContextResults.description: Maximum memories to inject at prompt time (only used when sessionContext is enabled)

recallMinScore.description: Minimum relevance score (0-100%) to include a memory in auto-recall. Set to 0 to include all results.

maxThreadMessageChars.description: Maximum characters preserved per captured OpenClaw thread message before truncation.

captureExclude.description: Additional glob patterns to exclude from auto-capture (* = one colon segment). Cron and isolated automation are always excluded via OpenClaw's isCronSessionKey (plugin-sdk/routing) plus bare cron:* internal keys.

captureSkipMarker.description: Text marker in messages that prevents capture for the entire session. When any message contains this marker, the session is skipped. Note: compaction may drop the marked message — use captureExclude for persistent filtering.

corpusSupplement.description: Register Nowledge Mem as a MemoryCorpusSupplement for memory-core's recall pipeline and dreaming. Enable when memory-core is your memory slot.

corpusMaxResults.description: Maximum results per corpus supplement search call (only used when corpusSupplement is enabled)

corpusMinScore.description: Minimum relevance score (0-100%) for corpus supplement results (only used when corpusSupplement is enabled)

apiUrl.description: Remote server URL. Empty = local (http://127.0.0.1:14242). Example: https://nowledge.example.com

apiKey.description: API key for remote access. Stored in plugin config, injected as NMEM_API_KEY env var. Never logged.
